topic.what: cross-plant unknown attack detection using medoid prototype alignment for ICS intrusion detection
topic.how: PCA compression maps heterogeneous traffic to shared space; K-Medoids extracts robust medoid prototypes; prototype-calibrated loss aligns target prototypes with source prototypes while preserving source discrimination
topic.why_matters: enables knowledge reuse across industrial plants under scarce labels and heterogeneous conditions without rebuilding models for each deployment

characteristics.what_it_measures: average cross-task accuracy across four unknown-attack transfer tasks
characteristics.context: average over DoS(G)→NMRI(W), SMRI(G)→MPCI(W), DoS(W)→NMRI(G), SMRI(W)→MPCI(G)

characteristics.what_it_measures: average F1-score across four cross-domain unknown attack tasks
characteristics.context: primary metric for deployment due to sensitivity to false negatives and false alarms

characteristics.what_it_measures: relative accuracy improvement over strongest baseline
characteristics.context: MPA vs ANN average accuracy comparison

characteristics.what_it_measures: relative F1 improvement over strongest baseline
characteristics.context: MPA vs ANN average F1 comparison

characteristics.what_itasures: composite directional gap capturing asymmetry between G→W and W→G transfer
characteristics.context: 0.5×(|ΔACC|+|ΔF1|); smallest composite gap indicating most balanced robustness

characteristics.what_it_measures: minimum accuracy achieved across four transfer tasks

good_for: cross-plant IDS deployment under domain shift
scenarios with scarce labeled target data
heterogeneous industrial traffic with noisy anomalies
open-set unknown attack detection in ICS
requires: labeled source domain with attack data
access to both source and target plant traffic
moderate compute for PCA and K-Medoids

novelty: medoid prototype alignment replacing direct sample-wise domain matching
prototype-calibrated transfer combining supervised loss entropy regularization and alignment
K-Medoids extraction preserving physically meaningful operating points
comprehensive directional robustness analysis for cross-plant transfer
open_problems: extension to open-set labeling with unknown attack class discovery
online adaptation mechanisms for evolving industrial conditions
real-time monitoring integration for deployment pipelines
theoretical analysis of prototype-guided transfer bounds
